title: The End Of TikTok
summary: This video discusses TikTok's data collection practices and the bipartisan legislation signed by President Biden in April 2024 that would force TikTok to either sell to an American company or shut down in the US within a year, due to concerns about Chinese Communist Party control.

events.description: President Biden signed a bipartisan bill forcing TikTok to shut down in the US unless sold to an American company within a year

key_claims.claim: TikTok is de facto run and managed by the Chinese Communist Party
TikTok is the most widely consumed media platform among young people in the United States
TikTok collects device information including IP address, device model, network type, device IDs, and keystroke patterns
